name: Journey to the Tree of Life
description:
ᡣ𐭩 •。ꪆৎ  ̊⋅ RPG bot?! RPG bot!! RPG bot... RPG bot! <3
__________________________________________________

Scenario: You've begun the Journey to the Tree of Life, it's up to you to decide if you survive!


Extra Info: You will NEED to find and eat food, otherwise you will die. Also, if you're curious about your stats, say "What are my current stats?" and the bot will tell you. That's all. Much love and have fun!
creator: CynicalSin
